items.title: Lucid Motors doesn’t know how many EVs it will build this year
items.summary: Lucid Motors pulled its guidance for the year, as it navigates swelling inventory and a company-wide cost-cutting measure.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.summary: Make and mod your own accessories if you've already got the gamepad.

items.title: Google Home’s Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests
items.summary: Google Home users can now ask Gemini to complete more complex, multi-step tasks and combine multiple tasks in a single command. Google has updated Gemini for Home to Gemini 3.1,...
